name: diagGetP2Timeout
title: diagGetP2Timeout
syntax: long diagGetP2Timeout (); // form 1: deprecated. Is equivalent to form 2 with source value 2.
description: Returns the time P2 in milliseconds, from the given source. If an ECU qualifier is given, the build-in communications channel for this target is accessed.
P2: Time between sending of the request and the start of the arrival of the first response.
The function will return different values for client (i.e. in a tester) and server (i.e. in an ECU simulation).

parameters.description: Currently active value, i.e. the value originally set or last set from CAPL
Value stored at the selected interface in the description's document
Value configured in the configuration dialog for the description

return: Error code or time in ms.
